claims.summary: Heartbeat arrival timing can correlate with felt viscosity, but cadence alone does not establish perceptual continuity.
claims.disposition: Verify numeric inter-arrival, jitter, freshness, and content/integration evidence remain separate.

claims.summary: Typed-versus-legacy coherence and eigenvector pairwise overlap are different questions and must not share one verdict.
claims.disposition: Verify hybrid coherence and high-overlap mode-collision tests retain separate fields, thresholds, and issues.

claims.summary: A bounded time-window comparison can test whether viscosity reports align with cadence, coherence, overlap, or none of them.
claims.disposition: Route a read-only telemetry/felt-window comparison with explicitly noncausal labels.

claims.summary: Adding a friction coefficient, perceptual-latency field, or new compatibility threshold would change a live-consumed report or ABI surface.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait before schema or rendering changes.
